arts.sum: Juventus rejected bids this summer ranging from €30-40 million from Arsenal and Borussia Dortmund for teenage wonderkid Kenan Yildiz . Juventus rejected the offers from Arsenal and Dortmund and made it clear that the 19-year-old Turkey star is not for sale at any price.
